src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated single marker access with the new marker list API to comply with SLF4J 2.x requirements in Java 21 environments.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed event.getMarker() check to event.getMarkerList() iteration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the @EnableWebFluxSecurity annotation which is no longer required in recent Spring Security versions.
Update SecurityWebFilterChain configuration to use the new Customizer.withDefaults() API for CORS and OAuth2 JWT settings.
